name: Gingerbread Men
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Ground ginger, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the wholewheat flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda. Add the natural bran and spices; stir until well combined.
3. Rub in the margarine into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the gran sugar-free sweetener, beaten egg, and orange juice. Stir this into the flour mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough gently on a floured surface to bring it together.
6. Roll out the dough thinly on a floured board. Use cookie cutters to cut into gingerbread men shapes (or other desired shapes) and place them on greased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until crisp and lightly browned.
8. Allow cookies to cool on a wire rack before storing in an airtight container.
This recipe is based on the original from "The Diabetics' Cookbook" by Roberta Longstaff & Jim Mann (1984) as shared and modified by Elizabeth Rodier in October 1993.
